member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession
member.summary: A implementation backed by SSH (via SSH.NET). It creates an interactive , forwards incoming data into the session , and forwards terminal input to the remote host.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.Client
member.summary: Gets the underlying SSH client instance, if initialized.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.ShellStream
member.summary: Gets the interactive shell stream, if connected.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.IsConnected
member.summary: Gets whether the underlying SSH client is connected.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.AutoFlush
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the shell stream is flushed after each write.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.#ctor(Renci.SshNet.ISshClient,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Initializes a new SSH session using an externally created client. The session does not own the client.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.#ctor(Renci.SshNet.ConnectionInfo,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Initializes a new SSH session by creating and owning a new client from the given connection info.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Initializes a new SSH session using password authentication and an explicit port. The session owns the created client.
member.param: Remote host name or IP address.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Initializes a new SSH session using password authentication on the default port (22). The session owns the created client.
member.param: Remote host name or IP address.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Text.Encoding,Renci.SshNet.IPrivateKeySource[])
member.summary: Initializes a new SSH session using key-based authentication and an explicit port. The session owns the created client.
member.param: Remote host name or IP address.
Private key sources used for authentication.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Text.Encoding,Renci.SshNet.IPrivateKeySource[])
member.summary: Initializes a new SSH session using key-based authentication on the default port (22). The session owns the created client.
member.param: Remote host name or IP address.
Private key sources used for authentication.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects the SSH client and creates an interactive with terminal type "xterm".

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.TryConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempts to connect without throwing, returning true on success.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.ReconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempts to reconnect up to a fixed number of times.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.TryReconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempts to reconnect without throwing, returning true on success.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.DisconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disconnects the SSH client and disposes the .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.WriteInputAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes input asynchronously into the SSH shell stream.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.WriteInputAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes input asynchronously into the SSH shell stream.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.Flush
member.summary: Flushes the shell stream.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Flushes the shell stream asynchronously.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.ClosePreviousClient
member.summary: Closes current client (if session owns it), and sets it to null

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.ValidateClient
member.summary: Validates that the client is connected and the shell stream exists; otherwise throws.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.SecureShellSession.DataReceived(System.Object,Renci.SshNet.Common.ShellDataEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles data received from the SSH shell stream by writing into the terminal buffer.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.ClientUninitializedException
member.summary: Thrown when an SSH client or shell stream is not initialized/connected when required.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.ClientUninitializedException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Thrown when an SSH client or shell stream is not initialized/connected when required.
